name: new-command-docs
description: This skill should be used when a new ArcKit command has been added and documentation needs updating across the repository. Triggers: update documentation for new command, update command count, add command to README, update DEPENDENCY-MATRIX, update docs/index.html, new command documentation checklist, update all docs for new command, add command to dependency matrix, update command tables, sync documentation after adding command, I added a new command what do I update, post-command documentat...
